title: Marrupa Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Marrupa, with a Z-Score of +3.46. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Marrupa has reached a critical level, with a score of 10.0/10. 
The temperature has resulted in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.1 GG, indicating a significant need for cooling. 
The relative humidity is at 34%, with a wind speed of 11.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
